steps.instruction: Prepare the sous vide bath and set the temperature for your desired doneness.
Season the protein and vacuum seal it in a bag.
Submerge the bag in the sous vide bath and cook for the specified time.
Finish the protein with a quick sear in a hot pan for texture.
Learn the basics of fermentation by making a simple sauerkraut.
Understand emulsification by creating a vinaigrette or mayonnaise.
